## What changed

## Validation

<!-- List the checks, tests, or model runs used to validate this change. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated refactors.
- [ ] Tests cover new behavior or the reported regression.
- [ ] Public API, artifact, or recipe changes are documented.
- [ ] Exact module paths are used; no fuzzy model matching was introduced.
- [ ] No credentials, private data, checkpoints, or generated artifacts are included.
- [ ] `ruff`, `pytest`, package build, and distribution metadata checks pass.
